title: d2c Flow Manifest
description: Mechanical bookkeeping file written by d2c-build-flow at the end of Phase 2a. Anchors a flow run to a specific prompt text and tokens-file version so that tokens changing between Phase 2a and Phase 3 becomes a detectable failure. Mirrors skills/d2c-build/schemas/run-manifest.schema.json for the flow layer.

schema_version.description: Flow manifest schema version. v1 only in MVP.

flow_prompt_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the raw flow prompt text at run start.

design_tokens_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the tokens file(s) at run start. Same hashing rule as run-manifest.tokens_file_hash: hash of design-tokens.json when split_files=false; SHA-256 over the four split files (core|colors|components|conventions) concatenated in that fixed order when split_files=true.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp (with timezone) of when the flow run started.

framework.description: Framework resolved from design-tokens.json at run start.

meta_framework.description: Meta-framework resolved from design-tokens.json at run start.
